info.title: ODataGen
info.description: CLI tool to generate C# classes from SAP OData v2 and v4 metadata XML files. Supports nested classes, proper namespace structure, and JSON serialization attributes.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OData Metadata to C# Class Generator (SAP and Dynamics 365)

commands.name: wrappers
commands.description: Generate OData wrapper classes (OData.V2 and OData.V4 namespaces)
